lineage.method: v_alpha_v1_lsk3 11-factor + SP-C F47 funding_flip_decay_phase (W3.1 idle factor unlocked at h5d via multi-horizon audit). Stacked with W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay.

sp_c_audit_2026_04_29.primary_finding: All 5 score-integrated factors (F12, F33, F62, F-cascade, F29) have residual t monotonically INCREASING with horizon, peaking at h10d. The doc-default 5d horizon is empirically suboptimal for every factor in any current score.
sp_c_audit_2026_04_29.f47_admission_at_h5d_via_lsk3: borderline G6 PASS (residual IC -0.020, t=-3.89, just above 0.02 floor)
sp_c_audit_2026_04_29.f47_admission_stacked_with_v5_or_v6: G6 FAIL (residual drops below 0.02 when conditioned on lsk3 + F62 or lsk3 + F-cascade)
sp_c_audit_2026_04_29.implication: v8 builds on lsk3 ONLY (not on top of v5/v6/v7). F47 captures information overlapping with F62/F-cascade but not lsk3 alone.

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: SP-C v8: lsk3 11-factor + F47 funding_flip_decay_phase (per-subject days-since-last-funding-sign-flip, W3.1 state-machine factor). F47 is a W3.1 idle factor that didn't pass G6 at h5d in W3.1 admission, but the SP-C multi-horizon audit found it borderline-G6-passes at h5d (residual IC -0.020, t=-3.89) and meaningfully passes at h10d (t=-5.61). Sign empirical NEGATIVE: assets with stable funding regime (longer days since flip) outperform; recent-flip assets carry unwind risk. Stacked with W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: Same long-short top-3 perp construction. Score adds -0.03*z(funding_flip_decay_phase) to lsk3 raw. Position size multiplied by W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay. Falsified if (a) walk_forward median sharpe drops more than 0.3 below v_alpha_v1_lsk3_g_v2 (+2.147) without compensating regime improvement; OR (b) regime_holdout fails.
thesis_profile.factor_formula: raw = -0.20*z(iv_smooth_60) -0.10*z(rv_5) +0.18*z(dh_60) +0.15*z(dh_5) -0.07*z(tt_smooth_5) -0.10*z(liquidity_stress_qv_iv) -0.06*z(momentum_decay_5_20) +0.05*z(taker_imb_dispersion) -0.05*z(quality_funding_oi) +0.10*z(downside_upside_vol_ratio_30) +0.07*z(funding_basis_residual_implied_repo_30) -0.03*z(funding_flip_decay_phase); final_score = tanh((percentile_rank(raw)-0.5)*1.80); target_weight_per_name = (long_leverage/top_K - short_leverage/bottom_K) * regime_gating_v2_multiplier(t)

experimental_reason: SP-C v8 score: lsk3 11-factor + F47 funding_flip_decay_phase. F47 was a W3.1 idle factor; SP-C multi-horizon audit found it borderline G6 PASS at h5d (residual IC -0.020, t=-3.89) and stronger at h10d (-0.026, t=-5.61). Lifecycle 'experimental' until cycle verifies.
